text_template: Dozens of executive orders, thousands of anti-LGBTQ plus bills, all designed to harm people we know, people we love, the people we are. Every day, Lambda Legal is in court fighting back. And when we take a stand, we're standing as the last line of dissents between real human beings and harm. But we don't do it alone. With every act of support, you stand with us. And together, we'll hold the line. Fund the fight at lambdelegal.org slash donate.
intro_variants: Dozens of executive orders, thousands of anti-LGBTQ plus bills, all designed to harm people we know, people we love, the people we are.
